'''dagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:saltatorically|saltatorically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saltatorically|saltatorically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dagate|dagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dagatesher|dagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagatesherĂ«m|dagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dagatero|dagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dagateshĂ«|dagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagateshĂ«m|dagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidagatero|gokidagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidagateshĂ«|gokidagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidagateshĂ«m|gokidagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godagankerom|godagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godagankeshĂ«|godagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godagankeshĂ«m|godagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godagankeya|godagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dagaterom|dagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagatemu|dagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dagateya|dagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidagaterom|gokidagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidagatemu|gokidagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidagateya|gokidagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dagagate|dagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dagagatesher|dagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagagatesherĂ«m|dagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dagagatero|dagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dagagateshĂ«|dagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagagateshĂ«m|dagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidagagatero|gokidagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidagagateshĂ«|gokidagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidagagateshĂ«m|gokidagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godagagankerom|godagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godagagankeshĂ«|godagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godagagankeshĂ«m|godagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godagagankeya|godagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dagagaterom|dagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dagagatemu|dagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dagagateya|dagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidagagaterom|gokidagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidagagatemu|gokidagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidagagateya|gokidagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠte|dĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠtesher|dĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠtero|dĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠtero|gokidĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠgĂŠnkerom|godĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠgĂŠnkeya|godĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠterom|dĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠtemu|dĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠgĂŠteya|dĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠterom|gokidĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠgĂŠteya|gokidĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafgafte|dafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafgaftesher|dafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafgaftesherĂ«m|dafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafgaftero|dafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafgafteshĂ«|dafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafgafteshĂ«m|dafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafgaftero|gokidafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafgafteshĂ«|gokidafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafgafteshĂ«m|gokidafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafgafnkerom|godafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafgafnkeshĂ«|godafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafgafnkeshĂ«m|godafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafgafnkeya|godafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafgafterom|dafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafgaftemu|dafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafgafteya|dafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafgafterom|gokidafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafgaftemu|gokidafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafgafteya|gokidafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
